context: 5-panel adversarial stress test of the product-first workflow refactor on https://solar-archive.onrender.com. Five agents tested orthogonal slices. After triage 17 of 19 items shipped in three sweep commits (3192118, fef59b8, 7ee0325); 2 remain open with notes.
verified_fixed_in_6b474de: Master toggle initial active state matches cards (Original=raw)
Master toggle stays position:fixed after back-from-editor
Browser back from editor is single-step (no longer a no-op)
left-rail-preview body class clears on non-editor transitions
Breadcrumb and master toggle stack vertically without overlap
Confirm-select modal shows placeholder when no source image

3192118: STRESS-003 (BFCache restore renormalises step + extracts _normalizeStepWithState helper)
STRESS-004 (Feedback FAB shifts up + icon-only on body.step-product)
STRESS-006 (Rapid master-toggle clicks clear stale is-pending-target)
STRESS-008 (Customize-section toggle uses explicit was-state pattern)
STRESS-009 (Scroll-to-top on step transitions, skipped on popstate)
STRESS-015 (Legacy 404 asset path swapped for canonical vibe URL)
STRESS-017 (Unicode primes normalised to ASCII quotes in variantLabel)
STRESS-019 (Square-aspect size variants get Square suffix)
fef59b8: STRESS-010 (Data-credits auto-modal delayed 5s + skip on user engagement)
STRESS-012 (HQ-ready toast suppressed during the per-Å toast window)
7ee0325: STRESS-005 (Mobile hero shrunk + beta banner hidden on step-product)
STRESS-016 (2-axis size chips show price per size)

open_items.title: Acrylic Print's 'Pick a variant' button sometimes skips variant selection
open_items.description: Clicking 'Pick a variant' on the Acrylic Wall Art card jumped straight to step-image with no .variant-panel ever opening. Could not reproduce in subsequent agent runs — possibly a race or a Chrome extension stealing the click. Held until we get a live capture.
open_items.fix_sketch: Add a console.log breadcrumb trail at every bail-out in _cardOpenPicker + showConfirmSelectModal so the next live repro pinpoints where the click is lost. Also consider hardening showConfirmSelectModal to NOT trigger commitProductSelection when the modal would render zero variant tiles.

open_items.title: No 'Buy' / 'Create on Shopify' button — investigation completed
open_items.description: Investigation: #btnBuyInEditor DOES exist in api/index.html and is wired in api/solar-archive.js (around line 9842). When BETA_MODE is on it stays in the DOM but with disabled=true + a buy-locked CSS class. So the agent was correct that they couldn't CLICK it (BETA blocks the click) but it's NOT missing.
open_items.resolution: Working as designed. BETA_MODE gates the Buy button to prevent accidental purchases during beta. When BETA_MODE flips off in production, the button enables itself once HQ + Printify upload are ready (_hasRealMockup + state.selectedProduct gate at updateBuyButtonState around line 9851).

out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.title: Render cold-start 502
out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.note: Free-tier hibernation. Not fixable from the app.

out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.title: ?clean=1 / ?fresh=mobile / ?cb=q1 query param mutations during testing
out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.note: Confirmed NOT in our codebase (grep -r returned 0 matches). These come from the test agent's Playwright scaffolding (cache-bust query params) or from a Chrome extension. Disregard.

out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.title: Multi-color chooser auto-commits vs confirm-select two-step
out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.note: Intentional UX: color chooser is single-axis (one tap = commit), confirm-select is multi-axis (color + size). Bifurcation is by design.

out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.title: Confirm-modal backdrop element with display:block in DOM after modal close
out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.note: False alarm: parent .confirm-modal.hidden has display:none, so the child element's rect collapses to zero. Visually hidden. Agent misread the computed style.

out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.title: Step badge reported as '2' on cold load by one agent
out_of_scope_or_test_artifacts.note: False alarm: prod has step-badge=1 on productSection (verified via curl). Agent hit a stale cache.
